title: Dolly Mixture Mini Sweet Jar - 500g
features: : Re Useable jar :Manufactured and packed in the UK in our Sweet Shop. :We have a huge range of sweets, retro sweets and pick and mix sweet boxes, sweet jars and sweet bags party favours and other sweet gifts for you to enjoy or give as a gift. : Small family Business
description: Product description Enjoy a colourful burst of fun with this 500g jar of Dolly Mixture mini sweets! Perfectly bite-sized, these nostalgic treats bring a playful mix of flavours and textures that brighten up any moment. Whether for sharing, snacking, or gifting, this jar is packed with cheerful sweetness to tickle your taste buds and spark a smile Ingredients Sugar, Glucose Syrup, Beef Gelatine, Maize Starch, Palm Oil, Acid (Citric Acid), Colours (Plain Caramel, Anthocyanin, Paprika extract, Chlorophyll , Lutein, Beetroot Red), Fat Reduced Cocoa Powder, Plant Concentrates (Safflower, Spirulina), Flavourings.

specifications_table.Specialty: Artificial Colour Free, Artificial Flavour Free
